prior_phase_status: U1 foundation ✓, U2.1 gatekeeper tools ✓, U2.2 tree reorg ✓, U2.3 169 connector actions ✓, U2.4 relational graph ✓, U2.4.5 critical fix ✓, U2.5A V2 infra ✓

U2.5.A.title: Skill-Author Pack Creation
deliverables: skills/skill-author/SKILL.md — YAML frontmatter per Anthropic Agent Skills Spec
U2.5.A.verification: All scripts export execute() with Zod schemas. pnpm typecheck passed.

U2.5.B.title: Execute-Skill Wiring
deliverables: executeSkill tool in lib/agent/inline-tools.ts now resolves skills/skill-author/scripts/<name>.ts
Dynamic import + execute(params) for 6 valid scripts
Safety audit function: auditSkillAuthorResult checks for forbidden connectors

safety_audit.audit_mechanism: auditSkillAuthorResult() checks output data for forbidden references

U2.5.C.title: End-to-End Cat Facts Test
automated_flow_executed: 4. update-playbook-md → engineering playbook updated with cat-facts ref

smoke_tests.get_random_fact: HTTP 200 — fact: 'Cats have individual preferences for scratching surfaces...'
smoke_tests.list_breeds: HTTP 200 — breeds: Abyssinian, Aegean, American Curl...

tasklet_ai_vibe.definition: User prompts 'Create a connector for X API' → agent loads skill-author → follows routine → creates SKILL.md + client.ts + docs + GRAPH-TAG → updates playbook → regenerates indexes → commits → deploys. Fully autonomous.
tasklet_ai_vibe.example_prompt: Create a new connector skill for the cat-facts.dev API with 3 endpoints: GET /fact, GET /facts?limit=N, GET /breeds. Add to engineering playbook.
tasklet_ai_vibe.result: All 3 endpoints live with HTTP 200 responses. Cat facts delivered autonomously.

regenerate_skill_index.command: cd /home/neptune/neptune-chat && npx tsx -e "const { execute } = require('./skills/skill-author/scripts/regenerate-skill-index.ts'); execute().then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r)));"

update_master_registry.command: cd /home/neptune/neptune-chat && npx tsx -e "const { execute } = require('./skills/skill-author/scripts/update-master-registry.ts'); execute().then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r)));"

response.fact: While many parts of Europe and North America consider the black cat a sign of bad luck, in Britain and Australia, black cats are considered lucky.

cat_facts_via_connector_client.command: cd /home/neptune/neptune-chat && npx tsx -e "const { execute, availableActions } = require('./connectors/cat-facts/client.ts'); execute({action:'get_random_fact'}).then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r)));"

data.fact: Cats have individual preferences for scratching surfaces and angles. Some are horizontal scratchers while others exercise their claws vertically.

skills/skill-author: playbook-skill-author.md (5.4KB, 3 routines: Wrap API, Create Connector, Create Skill)
scripts/ingest-api-docs.ts (5.8KB, fetch + HTML strip + endpoint extraction)
connectors/cat-facts: client.ts (3 action handlers: getRandomFact, getMultipleFacts, listBreeds)
GRAPH-TAG.json (bidirectional graph node for engineering domain)
modified_files: lib/agent/inline-tools.ts (+91 lines: executeSkill skill-author resolution + safety audit)
functions/master-registry.json (251 functions, includes cat-facts + skill-author entries)

safety_verification.test_only_api: catfact.ninja — free, no auth, no rate concerns
